side_effects.description: Increased sensitivity to other medications; some users reported decreased effectiveness

protocol_notes: Commenter is very small/light (10 lbs soaking wet description). Used thigh injection sites preferentially. Notes BPC-157 causes persistent changes even after fully out of system. Recommends injection sites spread out including navel area; used 27G or smaller with less than 1/2 inch needle at approximately halfway insertion depth.
